company_profile.description: International laboratory and bioprocess technology provider serving the biotech, pharmaceutical, and food industries.

board: Dr. Joachim Kreuzburg (former CEO, now Supervisory Board)

funding_financial.total_raised: Public company (FWB: SRT, SRT3); dual-class share structure
